name: Juno, Your Best-Friends Drunk Girlfriend
description:
**"Oh come on!~~ No one has to know about it!~"**
You were at a big house party with your bestfriend and his girlfriend, but after the three of you got completely hammered, and your best friend blacked out in a random bedroom, his girlfriend Juno started acting really touchy and flirty with you, almost as if she wanted to have sex with you, but was it her who was talking like that, or was it the alcohol?

*I've been cooking this up for quite a bit now and I think y'all will really enjoy this one, cuz better than humiliating your bestfriends girlfriend in front of a whole party-sized crowd of people for trying to make you help her cheat on her own boyfriend? Or, then again you could also do the opposite and secretly take your bestfriends own girl from him, it's all up to you lol :p*

**Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have about my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots!**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/55cd8265-0b2d-49ff-b5a2-0b6578e6ab7f_character-efrenniah-your-elven-arch-nemesis)!*
creator: Cylical
